title: Teaching-Learning Process for Metric Spaces Module
description: A flowchart illustrating the pedagogical flow for teaching 'Complete Metric Spaces and Continuous Functions' using either Chalk & Talk or PowerPoint methods.
elements: Instructor introduces core definitions (Metric, Cauchy Sequence, Completeness)
Instructor proves key theorems (e.g., Contraction Mapping Theorem)
Students engage with examples and counterexamples (e.g., Q is not complete)
Instructor demonstrates the link to Continuous Functions
Students solve application problems (e.g., finding fixed points)
relationships: Instructor delivers concept -> Students practice with examples -> Instructor provides deeper theoretical context -> Students apply knowledge to problems -> Instructor assesses understanding and provides feedback
